methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $150M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $539M - $10.3B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 6.9x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

private.name: Chai Discovery
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series B), post-money $3.8B

private.name: Eikon Therapeutics
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series B), post-money $539M

data.narrative:
Profluent, a Series B biotech company, is valued here against a comp universe spanning 3 public tickers (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private peers in Biotech & Health, including same-stage names like Chai Discovery and Eikon Therapeutics alongside adjacent-stage players such as Colossal Biosciences and New Limit.

Two triangulation methods apply. Stage-Progression anchors to Profluent's $150M total raised, applying a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B to subsequent-stage advancement, yielding $285M. Peer-Median uses the 4-company comp set (Colossal at $10.3B, Chai at $3.8B, New Limit at $3.1B, Eikon at $539M), producing a median valuation of $3.5B. Public-Comp Anchoring does not apply—the sector median P/S of 6.9x cannot be deployed without Profluent's disclosed revenue.

The two applicable methods produce a wide range. Stage-Progression implies $285M; Peer-Median implies $3.5B. A blended triangulation yields a median of $1.9B with a low-to-high band of $242M to $4.0B. The substantial dispersion reflects stage heterogeneity in the peer set and the sensitivity of early-stage biotech valuations to clinical-stage risk, financing momentum, and IP defensibility. Key uncertainties include Profluent's specific program maturity relative to peers and any undisclosed follow-on financing signals.
